design_elements: large multicolor rose illustration growing from dark clouds
stained-glass style rose with deep purple, orange, pink, and grey tones
grey stem with thorns and leaves emerging from black cloud base
consensus.overall_description: An off-white crewneck t-shirt featuring a large artistic rose graphic in a stained-glass style with dark purple, orange, pink, and grey tones, growing from a stylized black cloud base. A small SR monogram logo is printed at the upper center neckline.
patches: A large, embroidered patch on the front chest depicting two colorful roses with thorny stems growing from a dark cloud.
consensus.stitching_details: standard seam construction, ribbed neckband appears slightly contrasting in cream/white

claude: large multicolor rose illustration growing from dark clouds
stained-glass style rose with deep purple, orange, pink, and grey tones
grey stem with thorns and leaves emerging from black cloud base
gemini: The rose petals within the central graphic have a multi-colored, abstract pattern.

values.gemini: A white crewneck t-shirt featuring a large, colorful embroidered patch of two stylized roses on the chest and a small monogram logo on the back of the neck.
